text: 133 active todos. Morning briefing surfaces three. Remainder compounds as background weight. The list doesn't shrink, carrying cost increases.
Note says: pivot back to health. Health keeps losing the priority fight. Pattern is clear.
Haven't had lunch yet, pretty busy all around. Friday afternoon. The body's needs get noted but not honored.
Ideas.md grows. No time to review it. So much energy capturing, zero energy processing. Input without digestion is accumulation.
Open Mosque planning. MAPS Ready recruiting. PhotoPass development. Work projects. Usrah coordination. Each commitment feels small. The aggregate is crushing.
Sister Mallak: no response. Sister Afnan: no clear meeting time. Hazim: didn't reach out as promised. Relational debt accumulates when spread too thin.
iMessage integration most urgent. Week passes, not started. Urgent doesn't mean capacity exists. Urgency without bandwidth is guilt.
Kitchen reorganization identified as low-cost efficiency gain. Still not done. Even simple improvements can't compete against system building.
Work slowness observed as natural pace. Note says okay to slow down now. Framing rest as permission granted, not need recognized.
PhotoPass beta testers waiting. On-device ML pivot incomplete. Meanwhile new notification system designed. Building more before shipping what exists.
Thermomix investment considered. Laundry service too expensive. Claude Max deliberated. Meanwhile 133 todos suggest bottleneck isn't tools, it's load.
Open Mosque debrief agenda created days before event happens. Planning the retrospective before the experience. Process has replaced presence.
